scope_note: QA Path Shape Cert family [145]: classifies generator-sequence shapes in the Pythagorean tree. Four shape classes: UNIFORM_A (only M_A, consecutive integers), UNIFORM_B (only M_B, Pell chain with alternating norm), UNIFORM_C (only M_C, constant e), MIXED (two or more generators). Invariants: primitivity preserved, Pell alternation for UNIFORM_B, e constant for UNIFORM_C. Source: Barning 1963/Hall 1970/Price 2008, certs [134][135][141].
